name: ai-video-editor
description: Windows-first AI-ready video editor with a React/Tauri UI and C++ engine sidecar.

scripts.test: node scripts/check-playback-config.mjs && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-video-editor/protocol test && corepack pnpm engine:test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @ai-video-editor/protocol typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-video-editor/desktop typecheck
